key_themes: Strategic acquisition of Alia Software enhancing Shopify integration and ARR
Strong H1 FY2026 results with ARR exceeding £81m and recurring revenue growth
Insider buying by CFO and Chairman amid recent share price weakness
Attractive single-digit P/E valuation for quality SaaS/marketing tech business
Analyst buy ratings, new CRO appointment, and expansion initiatives
summary: dotDigital Group (DOTD.L), a marketing automation and customer experience SaaS platform, is generating positive sentiment following strong H1 FY2026 results showing ARR over £81 million (14% 3yr CAGR) and the strategically important acquisition of Alia Software (up to $60m deal) to accelerate Shopify ecosystem growth and data capabilities.[[1]](https://www.investing.com/equities/dotdigital-group-plc)[[2]](https://seekingalpha.com/article/4882657-dotdigital-group-plc-dotdf-q2-2026-earnings-call-transcript)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-1NYrolYpfI) Insider purchases by the CFO and Chairman on the recent share price dip, combined with maintained buy ratings from analysts like Canaccord Genuity and Deutsche Bank plus the appointment of a first Chief Revenue Officer, point to confidence in the growth strategy.[[4]](https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/DOTD-GB)[[5]](https://x.com/UKInvestorMAG/status/2035853977602994446) While the stock trades near the low end of its 52-week range (~44-48p vs highs near 92p), the single-digit P/E for a recurring-revenue SaaS business with expanding product suite is viewed as compelling.[[6]](https://x.com/1James1n1/status/2037123759375593874)
sources: 10+ web news articles (earnings calls, Alia acquisition, director deals, analyst notes), Investor discussion boards (LSE Share Chat, Stockopedia, ADVFN), ~15 relevant X posts discussing acquisition, valuation, and results
